# 📁 Outputs Folder

This folder stores data visualization outputs generated during Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA).

## 📊 Generated Files

* yield_distribution.png
* crop_vs_yield.png
* correlation_heatmap.png

## ⚙️ How to generate these files

Run:

python notebooks/eda.py

## ⚠️ Note

The output images are not included in this repository and will be generated after running the EDA script.
